stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Selection of WX+T mode on rotary switch 1 will help to detect and display areas of…

options.a: Turbulence within precipitation by detecting the Doppler shift of the falling droplets.
options.b: CAT within precipitation by detecting the Doppler shift of the falling droplets.
options.c: Turbulence within precipitation by detecting the Doppler shift of the reflected radar signal.
options.d: CAT within precipitation by detecting the Doppler shift of the reflected radar signal.
